creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

Hi,

Unfortunately, this break both things that depend on it,
devel/rubygem-devise and databases/rubygem-dm-types. Updating devise to
1.4.7 seems to fix it, but for dm-types, there isn't an update. There is
a dm-types 1.2.0 rc 2, but 1.2.0 final isn't out yet and it looks like
that requires exactly 3.0.0, not 3.0.1. I'll contact the developer and
see if I can get them to work with 3.0.1.

Thanks,
Steve
